arts.ttl: Inter Milan faces decision on Francesco Acerbi’s future amid Injury concerns
arts.sum: Francesco Acerbi's situation at Inter Milan has become a topic of discussion as the veteran defender grapples with ongoing physical issues. The post Inter Milan faces decision on Francesco Acerbi’s future amid Injury concerns appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter eye German talent Rocco Reitz: The Bundesliga’s rising star
arts.sum: Inter Milan have set its sights on a new midfield prospect, Rocco Reitz, the talented 22-year-old from Borussia Mönchengladbach. The post Inter eye German talent Rocco Reitz: The Bundesliga’s rising star appeared first on FootItalia.com.
